title: Safety Gym
summary: We’re releasing Safety Gym, a suite of environments and tools for measuring progress towards reinforcement learning agents that respect safety constraints while training.
summaryZh: 我们将推出Safety Gym ，这是一套环境和工具，用于衡量在培训过程中遵守安全限制的强化学习代理的进展情况。
highlights: We’re releasing Safety Gym, a suite of environments and tools for measuring progress towards reinforcement learning agents that respect safety constraints while training.
highlightsZh: 我们将推出Safety Gym ，这是一套环境和工具，用于衡量在培训过程中遵守安全限制的强化学习代理的进展情况。

title: GPT-2: 1.5B release
summary: As the final model release of GPT-2’s staged release, we’re releasing the largest version (1.5B parameters) of GPT-2 along with code and model weights to facilitate detection of outputs of GPT-2 models. While there have been larger language models released since August, we’ve continued with our original staged release
summaryZh: 作为GPT-2分阶段发布的最终模型版本，我们发布了GPT-2的最大版本（ 1.5B参数）以及代码和模型权重，以方便检测GPT-2模型的输出。虽然自8月以来已经发布了更大的语言模型，但我们继续推出原始的分阶段版本
